titleStmt.title: SII 9.129: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 129. (A.R. No. 322 of 1925.) ON A STONE LYING BEFORE THE TEMPLE OF KALLESVARA AT HARKANAL, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 988, Parābhava, Bhādrapada, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra, Sōmagrahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1066 September 6, Wednesday, (not Monday), when there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Trailōkyamalladēva and records that, under the orders of the king's feudatory Vishṇuvardhana-Mahārāja Vijayādityadēva, “lord of Vēṅgī”, who was ruling over the Noḷambavāḍi thirty two-thousand, the Mahāsandhivigrahin, Daṇḍanāyaka, Pergeḍe Dēvapayya and other Karaṇas made a grant of the village Nillajige in Muḻtage thirty, a subdivision of Kōgaḷi five-hundred, for the service of the god Svayambhu-Kalideva of Arahaṭa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladēvara . vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamā
namāca(ṁ)ndrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmārādhakaṁ sarvvalōkāśraya(ṁ)
nāhavamallanaṁkakāṟaṁ paramaṇḍaḷasūṟekāṟaṁ samastabudhajanāśrayaṁ kaṭakaprākāraṁ vandijanādhāraṁ Arima
damaṟdhanaṁ pratāpajanā®dana(ṁ)nacaḻitavākyaṁ cāḷukyamāṇikyaṁ vijayaśrīkēḻīsadana
nabhinavamadanaṁ vipakṣakuḻakāḷadaṇḍaṁ caṇḍamārttaṇḍaṁ ripurāyakumārahridayasellaṁ sā
hasamallaṁ dīnānāthacintāmaṇi maṇḍaḷikamakuṭacūḍāmaṇi veṁgimaṁḍaḷēśvaranayya
nadaṇḍaṁ śrīviṣṇuvaṟdhanamahārājavijayādityadēvaru nōḻaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsira
mumaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappaśrīmanmahāsandhivigrahi daṇḍanāyakaṁ perggeḍe
dēvapayyapramukhakaraṇaṁgaḻu dēvara besadiṁ sakavarṣa 988 neya parābhavasaṁvatsa
rada bhādrapadada puṇnime sōmavāradandina sōmagrahaṇanimittadiṁ śrīmadara
haṭada svayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmidēvargge khaḍḍasphuṭetajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ snānanivēdyakka(ṁ)mā
gi nidhinidhānanikṣēpasahasradaṇḍaṁ modalāge sarvvābhyantarasiddhiyiṁ biṭṭa kōgaḷiyaynū
ṟaṟoḷagaṇa kampaṇaṁ mūḻtage mūvattaṟa baḷiya nillajigeyūroṁdumaṁ dēvargge koṭṭaru
Intī dharmmama pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgeyoḻaṁ sāsira ka
brāhmaṇarggeyubhayamukhi koṭṭa phaḷamakku Ī dharmmamanaḻidāta
rukṣētradoḷu caturvvēdapāragarappa sāsi
vileyumanintinitumanaḻida mahā
rvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yadā bhūmiOne or two more lines after this are broken away and lost.
Digital edition of SII 9.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
